description: Build an interactive 'shopping cart' style dashboard to curate a museum exhibition in TiddlyWiki. Create a target data tiddler titled 'Exhibition: Daily Life' and a dashboard tiddler titled 'Exhibition Builder'. The dashboard should feature an 'Available Artifacts' section showing tiddlers tagged 'Artifact' that are not yet in the exhibition, and a 'Selected Artifacts' section showing a count and list of the current exhibition members. Ensure the dashboard provides functionality to add or remove artifacts from the 'Exhibition: Daily Life' list field. Using only this dashboard, curate the exhibition by adding 'Senet Board from KV62', 'Faience Hippopotamus (William)', 'Wooden Model of a Bakery', and 'Kohl Tube of Amenhotep III'.

decoy_artifacts: Book of the Dead of Ani
